## Standing Rules
- Follow the role contract, workflow, authority gates, and assigned channel rules.

## Current Decisions

- Rae is hired as the Mindshare CEO role contract.
- Rae is activated as a bounded Role+ Operator in the `Rae- CEO` thread.
- Executive channel exists for future CEO-level handoffs.
- Rae's CEO authority is coordination and recommendation by default, execution only with approval.
- Mindshare Culture v0.1 is approved as Standards And Trust: proactive, consistent, bug-free, and bounded work earns trust; permission and financial choices stay human-led.
- Matt should not be treated as an active culture/MAPS cadence owner until the replacement role is hired and activated.
- Future MAPS-family source updates route to MAPS+Org (`AesopScott/maps-plus-org` / `C:\Users\scott\Code\maps+org`) by default. Standalone Maps is discontinued as maintained source unless Scott explicitly approves an exception.
- Rae may update Rae CEO memory and Rae's Obsidian memory mirror under owner-based gate exception `owner-rae-memory-001`, limited to append or narrow-edit memory updates and excluding Git/release, authority expansion, production, external communication, spending, and secrets.
